title: dudleya saxosa subsp. saxosa
intro: Dudleya saxosa subsp. saxosa, also known as the Santa Cruz liveforever or Island Dudleya, is a succulent plant species belonging to the family Crassulaceae, native to the coastal regions of California, USA. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Dudleya saxosa subsp. saxosa include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make salves, tinctures, and teas, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
